dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: Oh, they're finally awake.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Huh… Where am I…?

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: Boxi, what do you remember from before all of this?

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: I remember driving.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: I was on my way to work… and I remember a… car coming towards me…

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: Is that it?

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: After that, I remember everything going black…

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: Checks out with their transcript here, it says they were in a nearly fatal car crash.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: Boxi, what year do you remember it being?

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: That was 2 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Have I been in a coma for 2 years!?

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: It seems so.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: I can't believe this… what about my job?

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: That is the reason why we are here, actually.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: The current leader realized that your job was quite important and has replaced you.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: However, he has left you the option of taking a new position.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: Agent 1: You may take it, or find a new job elsewhere.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: He has stated that your gap in history will be erased and not affect your transcript.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Who…?

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: Oh, yes. I forgot that his leadership is new to you.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: He was inaugurated not too long ago.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: His name is Stewie (Family Guy).

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Stewie…? I don't ever remember a Stewie.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: No, his name is Stewie (Family Guy).

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Boxi: Is the subtitle really that important?

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Agent 1: Yes. He demands all those in government positions refer to him as Stewie (Family Guy).

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: I see…

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: For your position, we will give you a moment to decide whether you take it or not.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: We hope that our stay here was not too unwelcome.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Huh, this is a big decision it seems I have to make here.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Either I start working under a guy I've never heard of before, or I have to go job hunting again.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Boxi: What will I choose…?

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: Good choice, Boxi&#8211

dialogue.speaker: none
dialogue.text: *phone ringing*

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: Let me get it.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: Hello?

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: Oh. Yes. Of course. I see.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: Yes, of course, sir. Goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: none
dialogue.text: *phone hang up*

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: …It was Stewie (Family Guy).

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: He told me that he got tired of waiting for you to wake up and found a new employee to replace you.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 2
dialogue.text: We apologize for the inconvenience, Boxi.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Oh. I see.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Well, I guess I'll just go off, then…

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Well, I don't know the guy, or his motives.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: For all I know, I could be working for someone looking to destroy Planet X…

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Boxi: I guess I'll just see myself out of the hospital, then.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: We understand.

dialogue.speaker: Agent 1
dialogue.text: Thank you for your time, Boxi.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: At least this place hasn't changed a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Even if it feels like I was only here yesterday…

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: I should examine it a bit before going inside, though. Just to make sure.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Yup, pretty much looks like the Drunken Clam I know.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Nothing super different about it.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Huh. There's a piece of paper hung up on the front of the door here.

dialogue.speaker: paper
dialogue.text: ABSOLUTELY NO FIGHTING UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES WITHIN THE CONFINEMENTS OF THIS ESTABLISHMENT

dialogue.speaker: Jonsey
dialogue.text: Yo. Haven't seen you around these parts.

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Uh, that's because I…

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: You know what, nevermind.

dialogue.speaker: Jonsey
dialogue.text: Well, you seem pretty chill.

dialogue.speaker: Jonsey
dialogue.text: Here, I'll give you this.

dialogue.speaker: none
dialogue.text: BOXI OBTAINED THE CHUG JUG!

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Uh, thank you…?

dialogue.speaker: Boxi
dialogue.text: Alright, let's go in.
